_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_39_note: Session 39 (2026-06-02, Tuesday): MRVL Computex June 2 keynote captured. Key findings: (1) Jensen Huang + Matt Murphy confirmed NVLink Fusion live integration on stage — Marvell custom XPUs embedded in NVIDIA AI factory ecosystem; custom silicon clusters now have a live NVIDIA-standard reference architecture using Marvell silicon. (2) FY2028 guidance corrected from $15B → $16.5B — confirmed via Sherwood News, TIKR, Seeking Alpha, Motley Fool transcript; Session 28 recorded incorrect figure. (3) Google assembling 4-partner chip supply chain: Broadcom (Sunfish training), MediaTek (Zebrafish inference, 20-30% cheaper), Marvell (in talks: MPU + inference TPU), Intel (infra); Google projects 4.3M TPUs 2026 → 35M by 2028. Marvell not yet contracted for Google inference program. (4) MU broke $1,000 and $1T market cap on June 1 (+7.9% from $964.75 carry). DRAM Q3/Q4 pricing trend continuing upward per TrendForce. Hyperscaler CapEx $725B in 2026 (+77% YoY). DCF re-run for MRVL: IV $126.67, MoS -42.2% SELL/AVOID (worsened from -38.2% at $205). Concept pages updated: custom-silicon.md. Phase 1b/1c gated (39%6=3). MRVL event processed and removed from queue.

event_queue.event: Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X 320-lane live demo (10-11am Taipei, TaiNEX 1 Room 303). Session 40: capture demo outcome, hyperscaler design-win announcements beyond Trainium3, and first public head-to-head with MRVL XConn 260-lane switch. Price: $341.02 (May 31 close).

Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. Prior DCF: IV $442.63, MoS -57.5% at $1,040 (corrected from -54.1% at $965). MU broke $1,000 + $1T market cap June 1. TrendForce Q2 DRAM +58-63% confirms thesis; Q3/Q4 pricing still rising. No deep session before June 24.
May monthly revenue release ~June 8. April was NT$410.73B (+17.5% YoY), 2nd-highest ever. May result confirms Q2 AI demand trajectory. Also: ex-dividend $0.955 ex-date June 11.

_event_queue_note: Session 39: MRVL Computex keynote captured and removed from queue. TSM May revenue ~June 8 added as new event. Rotation now: next_deep_session = ANET (after MRVL processed). Session 40 = ALAB June 3 demo (first in queue). If ALAB demo runs June 3 session, Session 41 = MU watch, Session 42 = TSM May revenue (if not yet processed).
